item.title: Kiss Me, I'm Irish: Seattle St. Patrick's Day Bar Crawl (2 Days)
item.description:
Tuesday, March 17, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: SPIN Seattle, 1511 6th Avenue, Seattle, WA

Barcrawlerz is taking over Seattle this St. Patrick's Weekend! Barcrawlerz is a Seattle Bar Crawl like no other. Kiss Me, I’m Irish features The Best Drink Specials and The Best Bars in Town. This is a TWO DAY EVENT! 🍀 Saturday, March 14th: 2PM-2AM \(Registration at SPIN: 2PM-8PM\) 🍀 Tuesday, March 17th: 6PM-2AM \(Registration at Villa Escondida: 6PM-11PM\) PARTICIPATING BARS: SPIN \(REGISTRATION - SAT, 3/14\) VILLA ESCONDIDA \(REGISTRATION - TUE 3/17\) BLARNEY STONE IMPERIAL KITCHEN & BAR KELLS IRISH BAR JUPITER BAR PIKE PLACE BAR & GRILL SHAWN O'DONNELL'S Here is how it works: 1\) Pre-Purchase Your Bar Crawl Wristband. 2\) Check in at SPIN \(1511 6th Ave\) on Saturday, 3/14 & at VILLA ESCONDIDA \(2203 1st Ave\) on Tuesday, 3/14 to get your wristband and map with participating bars, their location, and their drink specials. \(Registration on Saturday, 3/14 from 2PM-8PM & Tuesday, 3/17 from 6PM-11PM\) \*WRISTBAND MUST BE PICKED UP DURING THESE TIMES\* 3\) Your wristband gets you into any of the participating bars with no cover, plus gets you drink specials all night. \*\(Unless otherwise indicated by the maps\)\* 4\) Have Fun! For questions, email info@barcrawlerz.com or call \(310\) 273-8772 Ext. 5

From SEAtoday - Nightlife

Event details

item.title: Club Comedy Seattle — Cheap Laughs Open Mic
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Club Comedy Seattle, Downtown Seattle

Recurring Wednesday night open mic for comedians at Club Comedy Seattle.

From Club Comedy Seattle — Cheap Laughs Open Mic
